raw.subject: Your Chico page caught my eye, SkyLab Nails & Spa
raw.body:
Hi,

I've been admiring your Black Angus heritage and the creativity you bring to your nail art. Your use of Swarovski crystals and freehand designs is truly unique.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers, like those looking for personalized nail care services in a comfortable atmosphere, to book elsewhere.

I sketched a page idea from what you post on Facebook, featuring a services menu, a work gallery showcasing your creations, a prominent booking CTA, and hours & location information.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/skylab-nails-spa-chico

Building a simple website like this can be a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. If you'd like to discuss details or get a quote, please reply or I'd be happy to schedule a quick call.
